## Purpose

Describe the problem and the proposed change.

## Change classification

- [ ] Repository foundation
- [ ] Scientific method
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security or data governance

## Validation

- [ ] Unit or integration tests added or updated
- [ ] `make verify` passes
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated
- [ ] No participant data, credentials, or private paths included
- [ ] Scientific and numerical implications documented
- [ ] Performance implications measured or explicitly unmeasured

## Claims

List any README, documentation, benchmark, or scientific claim changed by this pull request and provide evidence.
